elements.description: Shower zone (อาบน้ำ), a distinct sub-area within WC.2, separated from the toilet zone by the fixture layout though within one room -- floor level 3.63m is 0.02m lower than the main ห้องน้ำ2 zone (3.65m), likely for drainage. warnings: This sheet (A-16) is dedicated entirely to WC.2 (2nd-floor bathroom) -- see the upper floor plan (หน้า07, element 'ห้องน้ำ2') which showed a matching '3 +3.65 2' box and 'WC2 A-16 ดูแบบขยาย' callout.
One of 2 views on this page; sibling is the section view _view2_wc2_section.json.

This bathroom is notable for having a distinct shower zone (อาบน้ำ, level +3.63) separate from the main toilet zone (ห้องน้ำ2, level +3.65) within the same room -- a slightly lower floor level (0.02m) in the shower zone, presumably for drainage, is a level of detail not present on WC.1's simpler single-zone layout (หน้า17).
This sheet is A-16 (not A-17 as in house #4) since this house has only 2 sections (A-11, A-12) instead of 3, shifting every later sheet number down by 1.
